title: Add local-first MLX search workflow
author: sueun-dev

data.description: Adds runtime shard and validation-sequence limits for local proxy iteration without changing the default challenge path.
Adds a local MLX sweep harness with proxy/full-val modes for faster local hyperparameter search.
Introduces budget-aware architecture filtering for local search.

novel_contributions: Runtime shard and validation-sequence limits for local proxy iteration
Local MLX sweep harness with proxy/full-val modes
Documentation of an Apple Silicon local search workflow in the README and a dedicated playbook
